name: Talisman of Ultimate Evil
description: This item symbolizes unrepentant evil. A creature that isn't a Fiend or an Undead that touches the talisman takes 8d6 Necrotic damage and takes the damage again each time it ends its turn holding or carrying the talisman.

touch_damage.creature_types: Any creature that isn't Fiend or Undead
touch_damage.trigger: Touches talisman and each turn it ends holding/carrying it

holy_symbol.spell_attack_bonus: +2 to spell attack rolls while wearing or holding

ultimate_end.target: One creature on ground you can see
ultimate_end.on_failure: Falls into fissure and is destroyed, leaving no remains
ultimate_end.on_success: Takes 4d6 Psychic damage, doesn't fall into fissure
ultimate_end.fissure_closes: After resolution, fissure closes leaving no trace
ultimate_end.destruction: When last charge expended, talisman dissolves into foul-smelling slime and destroyed
